name: California Institute of Technology
meets_full_need_notes: Caltech meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Families earning under $60,000 typically pay nothing; under $217,000 may qualify for aid.
no_loan_notes: Caltech eliminated loans from all financial aid packages. All institutional aid is grant-based. Students from families under $60k pay nothing; under $217k with typical assets receive grant aid.
ed_aid_implications: Caltech does not have ED. REA applicants receive same need-based aid as regular decision.
appeal_policy: Appeals reviewed for changed financial circumstances. Students contact Student Financial Services for professional judgment review.
